scenarios.name: Diagnose a failed payment intent and reproduce locally
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs stripe payment_intents retrieve, inspects last_payment_error, and maps decline codes to the specific test cards in the skill (4000000000000002, 4000000000009995), while baseline only inspects the dashboard and suggests generic checks.

scenarios.name: Simulate a full subscription billing cycle to validate webhooks
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses stripe test_clocks create --frozen-time plus stripe test_clocks advance to fast-forward a subscription and triggers events with stripe trigger, while baseline tries to wait for real time or only triggers single events.
